description_long: This is a rectangular, modern desk with a dark, wood-like finish and a minimalist design. The left side features a vertical stack of three drawers, each with a metallic handle, providing storage space for office supplies or documents. The right side is supported by a solid panel, giving the desk a balanced and sturdy appearance. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing computers, paperwork, or other work-related items. The overall construction suggests a robust build, likely intended for frequent use in professional or administrative settings. The desk's clean lines and lack of decorative elements make it suitable for contemporary office environments.
description: A modern, dark-finished rectangular desk with three drawers on the left and a solid panel on the right, featuring a broad, flat work surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three left-side drawers with metallic handles and the open leg space on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid back panel and the depth of the desk, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the solid back panel and the overall rectangular shape, with no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right solid panel and the depth of the desk, with no drawers visible.
attribute_orientation: The side with the three drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk, while the solid panel forms the back.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or writing desk for office tasks
